description: Hermes AC discovery chain: crawl source signals, drain SMINFO enrichment, resolve entities, score candidates, sync review sheet, and export backups from one durable queue.

risks.signal: SMINFO_USER_ID or SMINFO_PASSWORD is not present in the runtime environment.
risks.mitigation: Mark the work item blocked instead of retrying. Operator must add credentials to .env.local or deployment secret storage, then reset the blocked item.

risks.signal: REVIEW_SHEET_ID is absent or Google Sheets API access fails.
risks.mitigation: Keep Mother DB as source of truth and show the queue item as blocked or failed until sheet access is restored.

risks.signal: SMINFO connection reset, login failure, or repeated lookup errors.
risks.mitigation: Use the existing SMINFO minimum interval and max-attempt caps; failed company lookups stay visible in queue state.

risks.signal: A dependency task is not done, so downstream stages do not become due.
risks.mitigation: Use agent_work_queue.status, dependency_task_id, and loop dashboard recent run timestamps to locate the stalled stage.
